age_sex.detail: effect retained 96% after age/sex adjustment (AUC 0.92 -> 0.90)

site_scanner.detail: outcome exceeds scanner and the margin CI excludes zero (margin +0.55 [95% CI +0.52, +0.58])

brain_age.detail: brain-age R2=0.48, MAE=4.0yr; effect retained 94% after brain-age-GAP control (Franke/Gaser standard), 68% under the stricter predicted-brain-age control

biomarker_anchor.detail: p-tau217 correlation r=+0.49 (95% CI lower +0.44, n=876); amyloid-enrichment Δ=+0.352 (point-biserial r=+0.42, 95% CI lower +0.301, n=1131: 441+/690−)

replication.detail: held-out cohort AUC=0.92 [95% CI 0.79, 1.00] (train 0.93); n_test=41 over 11 aggregated held-out site(s)

caveats: p-tau217 measured on a partial subset (~45% missing in a realistic cohort) — anchor is suggestive, not confirmatory.

boltz_targeting.note: Boltz-2 open (MIT) AlphaFold3-class complex + binding-affinity prediction — a REAL predictor, not a stand-in; requires a GPU run

repurposing.mechanism_note: c-Abl tyrosine-kinase inhibitor hypothesized to promote autophagic clearance of misfolded amyloid/tau; explored in small early-phase Alzheimer disease studies.

boltz_affinity.note: Boltz-2 open (MIT) AlphaFold3-class complex + binding-affinity prediction — a REAL predictor, not a stand-in; requires a GPU run

repurposing.mechanism_note: RXR agonist hypothesized to enhance APOE-mediated amyloid clearance; small exploratory repurposing study in Alzheimer disease (results equivocal).

boltz_affinity.note: Boltz-2 open (MIT) AlphaFold3-class complex + binding-affinity prediction — a REAL predictor, not a stand-in; requires a GPU run

biomarker_fusion.note: offline surrogate logistic (hand-set coefficients, NOT fitted) estimated amyloid/tau PET positivity over the cohort — the L3 fusion box; the real vkola-lab/ncomms2025 multimodal transformer is a wired-ready seam NOT run by default (needs torch + GPU + gated weights via NEUROAD_REAL_FUSION=1); surfaced as pathology corroboration, NOT a referee gate

cross_attention_fusion.verdict: no CI-supported difference between cross-attention fusion and best single modality emb_only (AUC 0.9354): delta=-0.0322 within overlapping 95% CIs
cross_attention_fusion.disclaimer: FROM-SCRATCH numpy multi-head cross-attention used as a FIXED, non-trained FEATURE transformer: the Q/K/V projections and modality tokenizers are seeded random projections, so the cross-attention weights are data-dependent but nothing in the attention block is learned. The ONLY fitted component is the downstream logistic head, whose AUC is leakage-free (StandardScaler + PCA-10 + logistic fit inside each site-disjoint CV fold, bootstrap 95% CI, within-site permutation null via probe.auc_ci_perm). This is NOT the published vkola-lab/ncomms2025 ADRD transformer (that needs torch + GPU + gated weights) and is NOT a trained end-to-end model. ADNI-only decision support; NOT outcome-validated against known AD drugs.

pathway_enrichment.pathway: Amyloid precursor protein (APP) catabolism / secretase processing

translation.wet_lab_experiment: In Tanzi-style 3D human neural organoids, knock down the lead target (CRISPRi) and read out Aβ42/40 ratio + p-tau217 by MSD at 6 weeks; kill if neither moves beyond vehicle ±2SD.
translation.caveat: Decision-support only: prioritized molecular follow-ups for a promoted imaging survivor, routed via the dominant fluid biomarker — NOT a validated target, and never derived from the imaging embedding itself.

discovery_provenance.rationale: Named-contrast hypothesis (matched: predict) -> supervised probe/gauntlet points the head at 'dx_binary'.
discovery_provenance.expected_direction: the structural probe score should track plasma p-tau217 (expected r~0.3-0.55, modest not redundant) and be enriched in amyloid-positive subjects
discovery_provenance.kill_criterion: if the probe score shows no p-tau217 correlation (r<0.2) on the complete-case subset, the amyloid-cascade routing is wrong

tests.question: Disease signal, or just which machine acquired the scan?

tests.question: More than generic aging / atrophy?
tests.detail: brain-age R2=0.48, MAE=4.0yr; effect retained 94% after brain-age-GAP control (Franke/Gaser standard), 68% under the stricter predicted-brain-age control

tests.label: Biomarker anchor
tests.question: Backed by molecular pathology (p-tau217 / GFAP)?
tests.detail: p-tau217 correlation r=+0.49 (95% CI lower +0.44, n=876); amyloid-enrichment Δ=+0.352 (point-biserial r=+0.42, 95% CI lower +0.301, n=1131: 441+/690−)

tests.label: Replication split
tests.question: Reproduces on a held-out site / cohort?
tests.detail: held-out cohort AUC=0.92 [95% CI 0.79, 1.00] (train 0.93); n_test=41 over 11 aggregated held-out site(s)

caveats: p-tau217 measured on a partial subset (~45% missing in a realistic cohort) — anchor is suggestive, not confirmatory.

courtroom.prosecution: The claim that ADNI z-standardized FreeSurfer morphometry (UCSFFSX7 ST regions; weight-free feeder) separate AD from CN does not survive scrutiny. Even granting a +0.55 AUC leakage margin, that headroom is thin enough that acquisition confounds could account for much of the apparent effect. No single dimension cleanly collapses, but absence of a knock-out is not the same as demonstrated biology. The parsimonious reading is an acquisition/aging artifact until an orthogonal molecular anchor says otherwise.
courtroom.defense: The signal separating AD from CN is consistent with real disease biology. It withstood: Age / sex adjustment, Site / scanner leakage, Brain-age control, Biomarker anchor, Replication split. The outcome exceeds the scanner-prediction floor by +0.55 AUC on subject-disjoint splits — the effect is not merely which machine acquired the scan. Critically, it is anchored to a plasma p-tau217 / GFAP correlation on the complete subset (r=0.49) — molecular pathology, not pixels.
courtroom.judge_reasoning: Robustness score 100/100 places this finding at 'strong candidate'. The +0.55 AUC leakage margin clears the acquisition confound, which is why the defense retains standing. The finding meets the promotion floor and may proceed to the biomarker-gated biology step — as a hypothesis to test, not a conclusion to bank.

case.narration: Naive AUC = 0.932. After the adversarial gauntlet the claim scores 100/100 -> verdict: strong candidate. Promoted to the biology step.

boltz_affinity.note: Boltz-2 open (MIT) AlphaFold3-class complex + binding-affinity prediction — a REAL predictor, not a stand-in; requires a GPU run

biomarker_fusion.note: offline surrogate logistic (hand-set coefficients, NOT fitted) estimated amyloid/tau PET positivity over the cohort — the L3 fusion box; the real vkola-lab/ncomms2025 multimodal transformer is a wired-ready seam NOT run by default (needs torch + GPU + gated weights via NEUROAD_REAL_FUSION=1); surfaced as pathology corroboration, NOT a referee gate

cross_attention_fusion.verdict: no CI-supported difference between cross-attention fusion and best single modality emb_only (AUC 0.9354): delta=-0.0322 within overlapping 95% CIs
cross_attention_fusion.disclaimer: FROM-SCRATCH numpy multi-head cross-attention used as a FIXED, non-trained FEATURE transformer: the Q/K/V projections and modality tokenizers are seeded random projections, so the cross-attention weights are data-dependent but nothing in the attention block is learned. The ONLY fitted component is the downstream logistic head, whose AUC is leakage-free (StandardScaler + PCA-10 + logistic fit inside each site-disjoint CV fold, bootstrap 95% CI, within-site permutation null via probe.auc_ci_perm). This is NOT the published vkola-lab/ncomms2025 ADRD transformer (that needs torch + GPU + gated weights) and is NOT a trained end-to-end model. ADNI-only decision support; NOT outcome-validated against known AD drugs.

courtroom.prosecution: The claim that ADNI z-standardized FreeSurfer morphometry (UCSFFSX7 ST regions; weight-free feeder) separate AD from CN does not survive scrutiny. Even granting a +0.55 AUC leakage margin, that headroom is thin enough that acquisition confounds could account for much of the apparent effect. No single dimension cleanly collapses, but absence of a knock-out is not the same as demonstrated biology. The parsimonious reading is an acquisition/aging artifact until an orthogonal molecular anchor says otherwise.
courtroom.defense: The signal separating AD from CN is consistent with real disease biology. It withstood: Age / sex adjustment, Site / scanner leakage, Brain-age control, Biomarker anchor, Replication split. The outcome exceeds the scanner-prediction floor by +0.55 AUC on subject-disjoint splits — the effect is not merely which machine acquired the scan. Critically, it is anchored to a plasma p-tau217 / GFAP correlation on the complete subset (r=0.49) — molecular pathology, not pixels.
courtroom.judge_reasoning: Robustness score 100/100 places this finding at 'strong candidate'. The +0.55 AUC leakage margin clears the acquisition confound, which is why the defense retains standing. The finding meets the promotion floor and may proceed to the biomarker-gated biology step — as a hypothesis to test, not a conclusion to bank.

case.narration: Naive AUC = 0.932. After the adversarial gauntlet the claim scores 100/100 -> verdict: strong candidate. Promoted to the biology step.

biomarker_fusion.note: offline surrogate logistic (hand-set coefficients, NOT fitted) estimated amyloid/tau PET positivity over the cohort — the L3 fusion box; the real vkola-lab/ncomms2025 multimodal transformer is a wired-ready seam NOT run by default (needs torch + GPU + gated weights via NEUROAD_REAL_FUSION=1); surfaced as pathology corroboration, NOT a referee gate

cross_attention_fusion.verdict: no CI-supported difference between cross-attention fusion and best single modality emb_only (AUC 0.9354): delta=-0.0322 within overlapping 95% CIs
cross_attention_fusion.disclaimer: FROM-SCRATCH numpy multi-head cross-attention used as a FIXED, non-trained FEATURE transformer: the Q/K/V projections and modality tokenizers are seeded random projections, so the cross-attention weights are data-dependent but nothing in the attention block is learned. The ONLY fitted component is the downstream logistic head, whose AUC is leakage-free (StandardScaler + PCA-10 + logistic fit inside each site-disjoint CV fold, bootstrap 95% CI, within-site permutation null via probe.auc_ci_perm). This is NOT the published vkola-lab/ncomms2025 ADRD transformer (that needs torch + GPU + gated weights) and is NOT a trained end-to-end model. ADNI-only decision support; NOT outcome-validated against known AD drugs.

caveats: p-tau217 measured on a partial subset (~45% missing in a realistic cohort) — anchor is suggestive, not confirmatory.

courtroom.prosecution: The claim that ADNI z-standardized FreeSurfer morphometry (UCSFFSX7 ST regions; weight-free feeder) separate AD from CN does not survive scrutiny. Even granting a +0.55 AUC leakage margin, that headroom is thin enough that acquisition confounds could account for much of the apparent effect. No single dimension cleanly collapses, but absence of a knock-out is not the same as demonstrated biology. The parsimonious reading is an acquisition/aging artifact until an orthogonal molecular anchor says otherwise.
courtroom.defense: The signal separating AD from CN is consistent with real disease biology. It withstood: Age / sex adjustment, Site / scanner leakage, Brain-age control, Biomarker anchor, Replication split. The outcome exceeds the scanner-prediction floor by +0.55 AUC on subject-disjoint splits — the effect is not merely which machine acquired the scan. Critically, it is anchored to a plasma p-tau217 / GFAP correlation on the complete subset (r=0.49) — molecular pathology, not pixels.
courtroom.judge_reasoning: Robustness score 100/100 places this finding at 'strong candidate'. The +0.55 AUC leakage margin clears the acquisition confound, which is why the defense retains standing. The finding meets the promotion floor and may proceed to the biomarker-gated biology step — as a hypothesis to test, not a conclusion to bank.

case.narration: Naive AUC = 0.932. After the adversarial gauntlet the claim scores 100/100 -> verdict: strong candidate. Promoted to the biology step.

boltz_affinity.note: Boltz-2 open (MIT) AlphaFold3-class complex + binding-affinity prediction — a REAL predictor, not a stand-in; requires a GPU run

story.wet_lab_experiment: In Tanzi-style 3D human neural organoids, knock down the lead target (CRISPRi) and read out p-tau217 + total-tau by MSD with AT8 neuritic-tau burden at 6 weeks; kill if tau species do not move beyond vehicle ±2SD.
story.caveat: Decision-support only: prioritized molecular follow-ups for a promoted imaging survivor, routed via the dominant fluid biomarker — NOT a validated target, and never derived from the imaging embedding itself.

repurposing.mechanism_note: Recombinant GM-CSF hypothesized to modulate innate-immune / microglial clearance activity; early-phase repurposing in mild-to-moderate Alzheimer disease.

biomarker_fusion.note: offline surrogate logistic (hand-set coefficients, NOT fitted) estimated amyloid/tau PET positivity over the cohort — the L3 fusion box; the real vkola-lab/ncomms2025 multimodal transformer is a wired-ready seam NOT run by default (needs torch + GPU + gated weights via NEUROAD_REAL_FUSION=1); surfaced as pathology corroboration, NOT a referee gate

cross_attention_fusion.verdict: no CI-supported difference between cross-attention fusion and best single modality emb_only (AUC 0.9354): delta=-0.0322 within overlapping 95% CIs
cross_attention_fusion.disclaimer: FROM-SCRATCH numpy multi-head cross-attention used as a FIXED, non-trained FEATURE transformer: the Q/K/V projections and modality tokenizers are seeded random projections, so the cross-attention weights are data-dependent but nothing in the attention block is learned. The ONLY fitted component is the downstream logistic head, whose AUC is leakage-free (StandardScaler + PCA-10 + logistic fit inside each site-disjoint CV fold, bootstrap 95% CI, within-site permutation null via probe.auc_ci_perm). This is NOT the published vkola-lab/ncomms2025 ADRD transformer (that needs torch + GPU + gated weights) and is NOT a trained end-to-end model. ADNI-only decision support; NOT outcome-validated against known AD drugs.

tests.label: Age / sex adjustment
tests.question: Does the signal survive demographic covariates?
tests.detail: effect retained 96% after age/sex adjustment (AUC 0.92 -> 0.90)

tests.label: Site / scanner leakage
tests.question: Disease signal, or just which machine acquired the scan?
tests.detail: outcome exceeds scanner and the margin CI excludes zero (margin +0.55 [95% CI +0.52, +0.58])

tests.label: Brain-age control
tests.question: More than generic aging / atrophy?
tests.detail: brain-age R2=0.48, MAE=4.0yr; effect retained 94% after brain-age-GAP control (Franke/Gaser standard), 68% under the stricter predicted-brain-age control

tests.label: Biomarker anchor
tests.question: Backed by molecular pathology (p-tau217 / GFAP)?
tests.detail: p-tau217 correlation r=+0.49 (95% CI lower +0.44, n=876); amyloid-enrichment Δ=+0.352 (point-biserial r=+0.42, 95% CI lower +0.301, n=1131: 441+/690−)

tests.label: Replication split
tests.question: Reproduces on a held-out site / cohort?
tests.detail: held-out cohort AUC=0.92 [95% CI 0.79, 1.00] (train 0.93); n_test=41 over 11 aggregated held-out site(s)

caveats: p-tau217 measured on a partial subset (~45% missing in a realistic cohort) — anchor is suggestive, not confirmatory.

courtroom.prosecution: The claim that ADNI z-standardized FreeSurfer morphometry (UCSFFSX7 ST regions; weight-free feeder) separate AD from CN does not survive scrutiny. Even granting a +0.55 AUC leakage margin, that headroom is thin enough that acquisition confounds could account for much of the apparent effect. No single dimension cleanly collapses, but absence of a knock-out is not the same as demonstrated biology. The parsimonious reading is an acquisition/aging artifact until an orthogonal molecular anchor says otherwise.
courtroom.defense: The signal separating AD from CN is consistent with real disease biology. It withstood: Age / sex adjustment, Site / scanner leakage, Brain-age control, Biomarker anchor, Replication split. The outcome exceeds the scanner-prediction floor by +0.55 AUC on subject-disjoint splits — the effect is not merely which machine acquired the scan. Critically, it is anchored to a plasma p-tau217 / GFAP correlation on the complete subset (r=0.49) — molecular pathology, not pixels.
courtroom.judge_reasoning: Robustness score 100/100 places this finding at 'strong candidate'. The +0.55 AUC leakage margin clears the acquisition confound, which is why the defense retains standing. The finding meets the promotion floor and may proceed to the biomarker-gated biology step — as a hypothesis to test, not a conclusion to bank.

case.narration: Naive AUC = 0.932. After the adversarial gauntlet the claim scores 100/100 -> verdict: strong candidate. Promoted to the biology step.

boltz_affinity.note: Boltz-2 open (MIT) AlphaFold3-class complex + binding-affinity prediction — a REAL predictor, not a stand-in; requires a GPU run

biomarker_fusion.note: offline surrogate logistic (hand-set coefficients, NOT fitted) estimated amyloid/tau PET positivity over the cohort — the L3 fusion box; the real vkola-lab/ncomms2025 multimodal transformer is a wired-ready seam NOT run by default (needs torch + GPU + gated weights via NEUROAD_REAL_FUSION=1); surfaced as pathology corroboration, NOT a referee gate

cross_attention_fusion.verdict: no CI-supported difference between cross-attention fusion and best single modality emb_only (AUC 0.9354): delta=-0.0322 within overlapping 95% CIs
cross_attention_fusion.disclaimer: FROM-SCRATCH numpy multi-head cross-attention used as a FIXED, non-trained FEATURE transformer: the Q/K/V projections and modality tokenizers are seeded random projections, so the cross-attention weights are data-dependent but nothing in the attention block is learned. The ONLY fitted component is the downstream logistic head, whose AUC is leakage-free (StandardScaler + PCA-10 + logistic fit inside each site-disjoint CV fold, bootstrap 95% CI, within-site permutation null via probe.auc_ci_perm). This is NOT the published vkola-lab/ncomms2025 ADRD transformer (that needs torch + GPU + gated weights) and is NOT a trained end-to-end model. ADNI-only decision support; NOT outcome-validated against known AD drugs.

tests.label: Biomarker anchor
tests.question: Backed by molecular pathology (p-tau217 / GFAP)?
tests.detail: p-tau217 correlation r=+0.49 (95% CI lower +0.44, n=876); amyloid-enrichment Δ=+0.352 (point-biserial r=+0.42, 95% CI lower +0.301, n=1131: 441+/690−)

tests.label: Replication split
tests.question: Reproduces on a held-out site / cohort?
tests.detail: held-out cohort AUC=0.92 [95% CI 0.79, 1.00] (train 0.93); n_test=41 over 11 aggregated held-out site(s)

caveats: p-tau217 measured on a partial subset (~45% missing in a realistic cohort) — anchor is suggestive, not confirmatory.

courtroom.prosecution: The claim that ADNI z-standardized FreeSurfer morphometry (UCSFFSX7 ST regions; weight-free feeder) separate AD from CN does not survive scrutiny. Even granting a +0.55 AUC leakage margin, that headroom is thin enough that acquisition confounds could account for much of the apparent effect. No single dimension cleanly collapses, but absence of a knock-out is not the same as demonstrated biology. The parsimonious reading is an acquisition/aging artifact until an orthogonal molecular anchor says otherwise.
courtroom.defense: The signal separating AD from CN is consistent with real disease biology. It withstood: Age / sex adjustment, Site / scanner leakage, Brain-age control, Biomarker anchor, Replication split. The outcome exceeds the scanner-prediction floor by +0.55 AUC on subject-disjoint splits — the effect is not merely which machine acquired the scan. Critically, it is anchored to a plasma p-tau217 / GFAP correlation on the complete subset (r=0.49) — molecular pathology, not pixels.
courtroom.judge_reasoning: Robustness score 100/100 places this finding at 'strong candidate'. The +0.55 AUC leakage margin clears the acquisition confound, which is why the defense retains standing. The finding meets the promotion floor and may proceed to the biomarker-gated biology step — as a hypothesis to test, not a conclusion to bank.

case.narration: Naive AUC = 0.932. After the adversarial gauntlet the claim scores 100/100 -> verdict: strong candidate. Promoted to the biology step.

repurposing.mechanism_note: c-Abl tyrosine-kinase inhibitor hypothesized to promote autophagic clearance of misfolded amyloid/tau; explored in small early-phase Alzheimer disease studies.

boltz_affinity.note: Boltz-2 open (MIT) AlphaFold3-class complex + binding-affinity prediction — a REAL predictor, not a stand-in; requires a GPU run

repurposing.mechanism_note: RXR agonist hypothesized to enhance APOE-mediated amyloid clearance; small exploratory repurposing study in Alzheimer disease (results equivocal).

boltz_affinity.note: Boltz-2 open (MIT) AlphaFold3-class complex + binding-affinity prediction — a REAL predictor, not a stand-in; requires a GPU run

biomarker_fusion.note: offline surrogate logistic (hand-set coefficients, NOT fitted) estimated amyloid/tau PET positivity over the cohort — the L3 fusion box; the real vkola-lab/ncomms2025 multimodal transformer is a wired-ready seam NOT run by default (needs torch + GPU + gated weights via NEUROAD_REAL_FUSION=1); surfaced as pathology corroboration, NOT a referee gate

cross_attention_fusion.verdict: no CI-supported difference between cross-attention fusion and best single modality emb_only (AUC 0.9354): delta=-0.0322 within overlapping 95% CIs
cross_attention_fusion.disclaimer: FROM-SCRATCH numpy multi-head cross-attention used as a FIXED, non-trained FEATURE transformer: the Q/K/V projections and modality tokenizers are seeded random projections, so the cross-attention weights are data-dependent but nothing in the attention block is learned. The ONLY fitted component is the downstream logistic head, whose AUC is leakage-free (StandardScaler + PCA-10 + logistic fit inside each site-disjoint CV fold, bootstrap 95% CI, within-site permutation null via probe.auc_ci_perm). This is NOT the published vkola-lab/ncomms2025 ADRD transformer (that needs torch + GPU + gated weights) and is NOT a trained end-to-end model. ADNI-only decision support; NOT outcome-validated against known AD drugs.

discovery_provenance.rationale: Named-contrast hypothesis (matched: conversion, predict) -> supervised probe/gauntlet points the head at 'conversion'.
discovery_provenance.expected_direction: the structural probe score should track plasma p-tau217 (expected r~0.3-0.55, modest not redundant) and be enriched in amyloid-positive subjects
discovery_provenance.kill_criterion: if the probe score shows no p-tau217 correlation (r<0.2) on the complete-case subset, the amyloid-cascade routing is wrong

tests.label: Age / sex adjustment
tests.question: Does the signal survive demographic covariates?
tests.detail: effect retained 92% after age/sex adjustment (AUC 0.64 -> 0.63)

tests.label: Site / scanner leakage
tests.question: Disease signal, or just which machine acquired the scan?
tests.detail: outcome exceeds scanner and the margin CI excludes zero (margin +0.27 [95% CI +0.23, +0.30])

tests.label: Brain-age control
tests.question: More than generic aging / atrophy?
tests.detail: brain-age R2=0.48, MAE=4.0yr; effect retained 98% after brain-age-GAP control (Franke/Gaser standard), 64% under the stricter predicted-brain-age control

tests.label: Biomarker anchor
tests.question: Backed by molecular pathology (p-tau217 / GFAP)?
tests.detail: p-tau217 correlation r=+0.17 (95% CI lower +0.08, n=498); amyloid-enrichment Δ=+0.172 (point-biserial r=+0.24, 95% CI lower +0.128, n=888: 464+/424−)

tests.label: Replication split
tests.question: Reproduces on a held-out site / cohort?
tests.detail: held-out cohort AUC=0.82 [95% CI 0.61, 0.98] (train 0.63); n_test=42 over 11 aggregated held-out site(s)

caveats: p-tau217 measured on a partial subset (~45% missing in a realistic cohort) — anchor is suggestive, not confirmatory.

courtroom.prosecution: The claim that ADNI z-standardized FreeSurfer morphometry (UCSFFSX7 ST regions; weight-free feeder) separate MCI converters from MCI non-converters does not survive scrutiny. Even granting a +0.27 AUC leakage margin, that headroom is thin enough that acquisition confounds could account for much of the apparent effect. It failed or weakened under: Biomarker anchor (weakened), Replication split (weakened). The parsimonious reading is an acquisition/aging artifact until an orthogonal molecular anchor says otherwise.
courtroom.defense: The signal separating MCI converters from MCI non-converters is consistent with real disease biology. It withstood: Age / sex adjustment, Site / scanner leakage, Brain-age control. The outcome exceeds the scanner-prediction floor by +0.27 AUC on subject-disjoint splits — the effect is not merely which machine acquired the scan. Critically, it is anchored to a plasma p-tau217 / GFAP correlation on the complete subset (r=0.17) — molecular pathology, not pixels.
courtroom.judge_reasoning: Robustness score 82/100 places this finding at 'robust enough for follow-up'. The +0.27 AUC leakage margin clears the acquisition confound, which is why the defense retains standing. The finding meets the promotion floor and may proceed to the biomarker-gated biology step — as a hypothesis to test, not a conclusion to bank.

case.narration: Naive AUC = 0.652. After the adversarial gauntlet the claim scores 82/100 -> verdict: robust enough for follow-up. Promoted to the biology step.

repurposing.mechanism_note: c-Abl tyrosine-kinase inhibitor hypothesized to promote autophagic clearance of misfolded amyloid/tau; explored in small early-phase Alzheimer disease studies.

boltz_affinity.note: Boltz-2 open (MIT) AlphaFold3-class complex + binding-affinity prediction — a REAL predictor, not a stand-in; requires a GPU run

repurposing.mechanism_note: RXR agonist hypothesized to enhance APOE-mediated amyloid clearance; small exploratory repurposing study in Alzheimer disease (results equivocal).

boltz_affinity.note: Boltz-2 open (MIT) AlphaFold3-class complex + binding-affinity prediction — a REAL predictor, not a stand-in; requires a GPU run

biomarker_fusion.note: offline surrogate logistic (hand-set coefficients, NOT fitted) estimated amyloid/tau PET positivity over the cohort — the L3 fusion box; the real vkola-lab/ncomms2025 multimodal transformer is a wired-ready seam NOT run by default (needs torch + GPU + gated weights via NEUROAD_REAL_FUSION=1); surfaced as pathology corroboration, NOT a referee gate

cross_attention_fusion.verdict: no CI-supported difference between cross-attention fusion and best single modality emb_only (AUC 0.9354): delta=-0.0322 within overlapping 95% CIs
cross_attention_fusion.disclaimer: FROM-SCRATCH numpy multi-head cross-attention used as a FIXED, non-trained FEATURE transformer: the Q/K/V projections and modality tokenizers are seeded random projections, so the cross-attention weights are data-dependent but nothing in the attention block is learned. The ONLY fitted component is the downstream logistic head, whose AUC is leakage-free (StandardScaler + PCA-10 + logistic fit inside each site-disjoint CV fold, bootstrap 95% CI, within-site permutation null via probe.auc_ci_perm). This is NOT the published vkola-lab/ncomms2025 ADRD transformer (that needs torch + GPU + gated weights) and is NOT a trained end-to-end model. ADNI-only decision support; NOT outcome-validated against known AD drugs.

pathway_enrichment.pathway: Amyloid precursor protein (APP) catabolism / secretase processing

translation.wet_lab_experiment: In Tanzi-style 3D human neural organoids, knock down the lead target (CRISPRi) and read out Aβ42/40 ratio + p-tau217 by MSD at 6 weeks; kill if neither moves beyond vehicle ±2SD.
translation.caveat: Decision-support only: prioritized molecular follow-ups for a promoted imaging survivor, routed via the dominant fluid biomarker — NOT a validated target, and never derived from the imaging embedding itself.

discovery_provenance.rationale: Named-contrast hypothesis (matched: conversion, predict) -> supervised probe/gauntlet points the head at 'conversion'.
discovery_provenance.expected_direction: the structural probe score should track plasma p-tau217 (expected r~0.3-0.55, modest not redundant) and be enriched in amyloid-positive subjects
discovery_provenance.kill_criterion: if the probe score shows no p-tau217 correlation (r<0.2) on the complete-case subset, the amyloid-cascade routing is wrong

tests.label: Age / sex adjustment
tests.question: Does the signal survive demographic covariates?
tests.detail: effect retained 92% after age/sex adjustment (AUC 0.64 -> 0.63)

tests.label: Site / scanner leakage
tests.question: Disease signal, or just which machine acquired the scan?
tests.detail: outcome exceeds scanner and the margin CI excludes zero (margin +0.27 [95% CI +0.23, +0.30])

tests.label: Brain-age control
tests.question: More than generic aging / atrophy?
tests.detail: brain-age R2=0.48, MAE=4.0yr; effect retained 98% after brain-age-GAP control (Franke/Gaser standard), 64% under the stricter predicted-brain-age control

tests.label: Biomarker anchor
tests.question: Backed by molecular pathology (p-tau217 / GFAP)?
tests.detail: p-tau217 correlation r=+0.17 (95% CI lower +0.08, n=498); amyloid-enrichment Δ=+0.172 (point-biserial r=+0.24, 95% CI lower +0.128, n=888: 464+/424−)

tests.label: Replication split
tests.question: Reproduces on a held-out site / cohort?
tests.detail: held-out cohort AUC=0.82 [95% CI 0.61, 0.98] (train 0.63); n_test=42 over 11 aggregated held-out site(s)

caveats: p-tau217 measured on a partial subset (~45% missing in a realistic cohort) — anchor is suggestive, not confirmatory.

courtroom.prosecution: The claim that ADNI z-standardized FreeSurfer morphometry (UCSFFSX7 ST regions; weight-free feeder) separate MCI converters from MCI non-converters does not survive scrutiny. Even granting a +0.27 AUC leakage margin, that headroom is thin enough that acquisition confounds could account for much of the apparent effect. It failed or weakened under: Biomarker anchor (weakened), Replication split (weakened). The parsimonious reading is an acquisition/aging artifact until an orthogonal molecular anchor says otherwise.
courtroom.defense: The signal separating MCI converters from MCI non-converters is consistent with real disease biology. It withstood: Age / sex adjustment, Site / scanner leakage, Brain-age control. The outcome exceeds the scanner-prediction floor by +0.27 AUC on subject-disjoint splits — the effect is not merely which machine acquired the scan. Critically, it is anchored to a plasma p-tau217 / GFAP correlation on the complete subset (r=0.17) — molecular pathology, not pixels.
courtroom.judge_reasoning: Robustness score 82/100 places this finding at 'robust enough for follow-up'. The +0.27 AUC leakage margin clears the acquisition confound, which is why the defense retains standing. The finding meets the promotion floor and may proceed to the biomarker-gated biology step — as a hypothesis to test, not a conclusion to bank.

case.narration: Naive AUC = 0.652. After the adversarial gauntlet the claim scores 82/100 -> verdict: robust enough for follow-up. Promoted to the biology step.

boltz_affinity.note: Boltz-2 open (MIT) AlphaFold3-class complex + binding-affinity prediction — a REAL predictor, not a stand-in; requires a GPU run

biomarker_fusion.note: offline surrogate logistic (hand-set coefficients, NOT fitted) estimated amyloid/tau PET positivity over the cohort — the L3 fusion box; the real vkola-lab/ncomms2025 multimodal transformer is a wired-ready seam NOT run by default (needs torch + GPU + gated weights via NEUROAD_REAL_FUSION=1); surfaced as pathology corroboration, NOT a referee gate

cross_attention_fusion.verdict: no CI-supported difference between cross-attention fusion and best single modality emb_only (AUC 0.9354): delta=-0.0322 within overlapping 95% CIs
cross_attention_fusion.disclaimer: FROM-SCRATCH numpy multi-head cross-attention used as a FIXED, non-trained FEATURE transformer: the Q/K/V projections and modality tokenizers are seeded random projections, so the cross-attention weights are data-dependent but nothing in the attention block is learned. The ONLY fitted component is the downstream logistic head, whose AUC is leakage-free (StandardScaler + PCA-10 + logistic fit inside each site-disjoint CV fold, bootstrap 95% CI, within-site permutation null via probe.auc_ci_perm). This is NOT the published vkola-lab/ncomms2025 ADRD transformer (that needs torch + GPU + gated weights) and is NOT a trained end-to-end model. ADNI-only decision support; NOT outcome-validated against known AD drugs.

tests.label: Age / sex adjustment
tests.question: Does the signal survive demographic covariates?
tests.detail: effect retained 92% after age/sex adjustment (AUC 0.64 -> 0.63)

tests.label: Site / scanner leakage
tests.question: Disease signal, or just which machine acquired the scan?
tests.detail: outcome exceeds scanner and the margin CI excludes zero (margin +0.27 [95% CI +0.23, +0.30])

tests.label: Brain-age control
tests.question: More than generic aging / atrophy?
tests.detail: brain-age R2=0.48, MAE=4.0yr; effect retained 98% after brain-age-GAP control (Franke/Gaser standard), 64% under the stricter predicted-brain-age control

tests.label: Biomarker anchor
tests.question: Backed by molecular pathology (p-tau217 / GFAP)?
tests.detail: p-tau217 correlation r=+0.17 (95% CI lower +0.08, n=498); amyloid-enrichment Δ=+0.172 (point-biserial r=+0.24, 95% CI lower +0.128, n=888: 464+/424−)

tests.label: Replication split
tests.question: Reproduces on a held-out site / cohort?
tests.detail: held-out cohort AUC=0.82 [95% CI 0.61, 0.98] (train 0.63); n_test=42 over 11 aggregated held-out site(s)

caveats: p-tau217 measured on a partial subset (~45% missing in a realistic cohort) — anchor is suggestive, not confirmatory.

courtroom.prosecution: The claim that ADNI z-standardized FreeSurfer morphometry (UCSFFSX7 ST regions; weight-free feeder) separate MCI converters from MCI non-converters does not survive scrutiny. Even granting a +0.27 AUC leakage margin, that headroom is thin enough that acquisition confounds could account for much of the apparent effect. It failed or weakened under: Biomarker anchor (weakened), Replication split (weakened). The parsimonious reading is an acquisition/aging artifact until an orthogonal molecular anchor says otherwise.
courtroom.defense: The signal separating MCI converters from MCI non-converters is consistent with real disease biology. It withstood: Age / sex adjustment, Site / scanner leakage, Brain-age control. The outcome exceeds the scanner-prediction floor by +0.27 AUC on subject-disjoint splits — the effect is not merely which machine acquired the scan. Critically, it is anchored to a plasma p-tau217 / GFAP correlation on the complete subset (r=0.17) — molecular pathology, not pixels.
courtroom.judge_reasoning: Robustness score 82/100 places this finding at 'robust enough for follow-up'. The +0.27 AUC leakage margin clears the acquisition confound, which is why the defense retains standing. The finding meets the promotion floor and may proceed to the biomarker-gated biology step — as a hypothesis to test, not a conclusion to bank.

case.narration: Naive AUC = 0.652. After the adversarial gauntlet the claim scores 82/100 -> verdict: robust enough for follow-up. Promoted to the biology step.

cross_attention_fusion.verdict: no CI-supported difference between cross-attention fusion and best single modality emb_only (AUC 0.9354): delta=-0.0322 within overlapping 95% CIs
cross_attention_fusion.disclaimer: FROM-SCRATCH numpy multi-head cross-attention used as a FIXED, non-trained FEATURE transformer: the Q/K/V projections and modality tokenizers are seeded random projections, so the cross-attention weights are data-dependent but nothing in the attention block is learned. The ONLY fitted component is the downstream logistic head, whose AUC is leakage-free (StandardScaler + PCA-10 + logistic fit inside each site-disjoint CV fold, bootstrap 95% CI, within-site permutation null via probe.auc_ci_perm). This is NOT the published vkola-lab/ncomms2025 ADRD transformer (that needs torch + GPU + gated weights) and is NOT a trained end-to-end model. ADNI-only decision support; NOT outcome-validated against known AD drugs.

tests.label: Age / sex adjustment
tests.question: Does the signal survive demographic covariates?
tests.detail: effect retained 92% after age/sex adjustment (AUC 0.64 -> 0.63)

tests.label: Site / scanner leakage
tests.question: Disease signal, or just which machine acquired the scan?
tests.detail: outcome exceeds scanner and the margin CI excludes zero (margin +0.27 [95% CI +0.23, +0.30])

tests.label: Brain-age control
tests.question: More than generic aging / atrophy?
tests.detail: brain-age R2=0.48, MAE=4.0yr; effect retained 98% after brain-age-GAP control (Franke/Gaser standard), 64% under the stricter predicted-brain-age control

tests.label: Biomarker anchor
tests.question: Backed by molecular pathology (p-tau217 / GFAP)?
tests.detail: p-tau217 correlation r=+0.17 (95% CI lower +0.08, n=498); amyloid-enrichment Δ=+0.172 (point-biserial r=+0.24, 95% CI lower +0.128, n=888: 464+/424−)

tests.label: Replication split
tests.question: Reproduces on a held-out site / cohort?
tests.detail: held-out cohort AUC=0.82 [95% CI 0.61, 0.98] (train 0.63); n_test=42 over 11 aggregated held-out site(s)

caveats: p-tau217 measured on a partial subset (~45% missing in a realistic cohort) — anchor is suggestive, not confirmatory.

courtroom.prosecution: The claim that ADNI z-standardized FreeSurfer morphometry (UCSFFSX7 ST regions; weight-free feeder) separate MCI converters from MCI non-converters does not survive scrutiny. Even granting a +0.27 AUC leakage margin, that headroom is thin enough that acquisition confounds could account for much of the apparent effect. It failed or weakened under: Biomarker anchor (weakened), Replication split (weakened). The parsimonious reading is an acquisition/aging artifact until an orthogonal molecular anchor says otherwise.
courtroom.defense: The signal separating MCI converters from MCI non-converters is consistent with real disease biology. It withstood: Age / sex adjustment, Site / scanner leakage, Brain-age control. The outcome exceeds the scanner-prediction floor by +0.27 AUC on subject-disjoint splits — the effect is not merely which machine acquired the scan. Critically, it is anchored to a plasma p-tau217 / GFAP correlation on the complete subset (r=0.17) — molecular pathology, not pixels.
courtroom.judge_reasoning: Robustness score 82/100 places this finding at 'robust enough for follow-up'. The +0.27 AUC leakage margin clears the acquisition confound, which is why the defense retains standing. The finding meets the promotion floor and may proceed to the biomarker-gated biology step — as a hypothesis to test, not a conclusion to bank.

case.narration: Naive AUC = 0.652. After the adversarial gauntlet the claim scores 82/100 -> verdict: robust enough for follow-up. Promoted to the biology step.

biomarker_fusion.note: offline surrogate logistic (hand-set coefficients, NOT fitted) estimated amyloid/tau PET positivity over the cohort — the L3 fusion box; the real vkola-lab/ncomms2025 multimodal transformer is a wired-ready seam NOT run by default (needs torch + GPU + gated weights via NEUROAD_REAL_FUSION=1); surfaced as pathology corroboration, NOT a referee gate

cross_attention_fusion.verdict: no CI-supported difference between cross-attention fusion and best single modality emb_only (AUC 0.9354): delta=-0.0322 within overlapping 95% CIs
cross_attention_fusion.disclaimer: FROM-SCRATCH numpy multi-head cross-attention used as a FIXED, non-trained FEATURE transformer: the Q/K/V projections and modality tokenizers are seeded random projections, so the cross-attention weights are data-dependent but nothing in the attention block is learned. The ONLY fitted component is the downstream logistic head, whose AUC is leakage-free (StandardScaler + PCA-10 + logistic fit inside each site-disjoint CV fold, bootstrap 95% CI, within-site permutation null via probe.auc_ci_perm). This is NOT the published vkola-lab/ncomms2025 ADRD transformer (that needs torch + GPU + gated weights) and is NOT a trained end-to-end model. ADNI-only decision support; NOT outcome-validated against known AD drugs.

tests.label: Age / sex adjustment
tests.question: Does the signal survive demographic covariates?
tests.detail: effect retained 92% after age/sex adjustment (AUC 0.64 -> 0.63)

tests.label: Site / scanner leakage
tests.question: Disease signal, or just which machine acquired the scan?
tests.detail: outcome exceeds scanner and the margin CI excludes zero (margin +0.27 [95% CI +0.23, +0.30])

tests.label: Brain-age control
tests.question: More than generic aging / atrophy?
tests.detail: brain-age R2=0.48, MAE=4.0yr; effect retained 98% after brain-age-GAP control (Franke/Gaser standard), 64% under the stricter predicted-brain-age control

tests.label: Biomarker anchor
tests.question: Backed by molecular pathology (p-tau217 / GFAP)?
tests.detail: p-tau217 correlation r=+0.17 (95% CI lower +0.08, n=498); amyloid-enrichment Δ=+0.172 (point-biserial r=+0.24, 95% CI lower +0.128, n=888: 464+/424−)

tests.label: Replication split
tests.question: Reproduces on a held-out site / cohort?
tests.detail: held-out cohort AUC=0.82 [95% CI 0.61, 0.98] (train 0.63); n_test=42 over 11 aggregated held-out site(s)

caveats: p-tau217 measured on a partial subset (~45% missing in a realistic cohort) — anchor is suggestive, not confirmatory.

courtroom.prosecution: The claim that ADNI z-standardized FreeSurfer morphometry (UCSFFSX7 ST regions; weight-free feeder) separate MCI converters from MCI non-converters does not survive scrutiny. Even granting a +0.27 AUC leakage margin, that headroom is thin enough that acquisition confounds could account for much of the apparent effect. It failed or weakened under: Biomarker anchor (weakened), Replication split (weakened). The parsimonious reading is an acquisition/aging artifact until an orthogonal molecular anchor says otherwise.
courtroom.defense: The signal separating MCI converters from MCI non-converters is consistent with real disease biology. It withstood: Age / sex adjustment, Site / scanner leakage, Brain-age control. The outcome exceeds the scanner-prediction floor by +0.27 AUC on subject-disjoint splits — the effect is not merely which machine acquired the scan. Critically, it is anchored to a plasma p-tau217 / GFAP correlation on the complete subset (r=0.17) — molecular pathology, not pixels.
courtroom.judge_reasoning: Robustness score 82/100 places this finding at 'robust enough for follow-up'. The +0.27 AUC leakage margin clears the acquisition confound, which is why the defense retains standing. The finding meets the promotion floor and may proceed to the biomarker-gated biology step — as a hypothesis to test, not a conclusion to bank.

case.narration: Naive AUC = 0.652. After the adversarial gauntlet the claim scores 82/100 -> verdict: robust enough for follow-up. Promoted to the biology step.

courtroom.prosecution: The claim that ADNI z-standardized FreeSurfer morphometry (UCSFFSX7 ST regions; weight-free feeder) separate AD from CN does not survive scrutiny. No single dimension cleanly collapses, but absence of a knock-out is not the same as demonstrated biology. The parsimonious reading is an acquisition/aging artifact until an orthogonal molecular anchor says otherwise.
courtroom.defense: The signal separating AD from CN is consistent with real disease biology. The molecular anchor is incomplete, so the defense rests on the imaging survivors alone and asks only for follow-up, not acceptance.
courtroom.judge_reasoning: Robustness score 0/100 places this finding at 'fragile'. 5 dimension(s) could not be run and were excluded from the denominator — the verdict reflects only the evidence actually gathered. The finding sits below the promotion floor; it is not carried forward to a mechanism, and would need a stronger leakage margin or molecular anchor to be worth a scientist's quarter.

caveats: Not corroborated: no molecular anchor (no open plasma data) and no passing cross-cohort replication — cannot be promoted.
Completeness: 5/5 gauntlet tests could not run; score is renormalized over the tests that did.

courtroom.prosecution: The claim that ADNI z-standardized FreeSurfer morphometry (UCSFFSX7 ST regions; weight-free feeder) separate AD from CN does not survive scrutiny. No single dimension cleanly collapses, but absence of a knock-out is not the same as demonstrated biology. The parsimonious reading is an acquisition/aging artifact until an orthogonal molecular anchor says otherwise.
courtroom.defense: The signal separating AD from CN is consistent with real disease biology. The molecular anchor is incomplete, so the defense rests on the imaging survivors alone and asks only for follow-up, not acceptance.
courtroom.judge_reasoning: Robustness score 0/100 places this finding at 'fragile'. 5 dimension(s) could not be run and were excluded from the denominator — the verdict reflects only the evidence actually gathered. The finding sits below the promotion floor; it is not carried forward to a mechanism, and would need a stronger leakage margin or molecular anchor to be worth a scientist's quarter.

courtroom.prosecution: The claim that ADNI z-standardized FreeSurfer morphometry (UCSFFSX7 ST regions; weight-free feeder) separate AD from CN does not survive scrutiny. No single dimension cleanly collapses, but absence of a knock-out is not the same as demonstrated biology. The parsimonious reading is an acquisition/aging artifact until an orthogonal molecular anchor says otherwise.
courtroom.defense: The signal separating AD from CN is consistent with real disease biology. The molecular anchor is incomplete, so the defense rests on the imaging survivors alone and asks only for follow-up, not acceptance.
courtroom.judge_reasoning: Robustness score 0/100 places this finding at 'fragile'. 5 dimension(s) could not be run and were excluded from the denominator — the verdict reflects only the evidence actually gathered. The finding sits below the promotion floor; it is not carried forward to a mechanism, and would need a stronger leakage margin or molecular anchor to be worth a scientist's quarter.

caveats: Not corroborated: no molecular anchor (no open plasma data) and no passing cross-cohort replication — cannot be promoted.
Completeness: 5/5 gauntlet tests could not run; score is renormalized over the tests that did.
